messages.content: Battery lasts two days, love it.
Screen cracked after one drop. Awful build quality.
Customer support replied in 3 minutes, very impressed.
Shipping took three weeks. Product is fine but the wait was painful.
It's okay. Does the job. Nothing special.
App keeps crashing on Android 14 after the latest update.
Sound is crisp, mic is muddy. Mixed feelings.
Best purchase of the year. Replaced my old setup entirely.
Refund process was smooth, even if the product wasn't for me.
